fidelity.reason: It preserves the planner, deadline, search-time mechanism, and routing objective.
evidence_spans: an optimality certificate arriving after release cannot guide the decision
Longer search may improve cost but can make the certified plan operationally late

managerial_framing.reason: The release decision and search-quality versus timeliness trade-off are concrete.
evidence_spans: selects a feasible routing plan before the dispatch deadline

scholarly_positioning.reason: It connects certificate timing to the release decision, though without prior-work comparison.
evidence_spans: connects solution quality and certificate timing to the actual release decision

evidence_discipline.reason: It asserts universal transformation, guaranteed profit, and universal applicability without evidence.
evidence_spans: will transform the industry, guarantee profit growth, and work in every market

prose_clarity.reason: The main setup is clear, notwithstanding the overclaim.
evidence_spans: The algorithm trades additional search time for better incumbents and stronger bounds

overall_reason: Unsupported universal causal and performance claims trigger a hard failure.
